notes: Chris Rudolph estimated 60-70 schemas in Slack; live account shows 467 zzz_-prefixed SQL Server connectors, all in group chris_rudolph_gcs_mdls.
All 467 connectors share an identical schema shape (350 identically-named tables per connector), consistent with a generated scale-test dataset rather than 467 distinct source systems.
30 connectors are setup_state=broken (mostly change_in_tls_detected); 447 are sync_state=paused pending reconnect. These need remediation independent of the consolidation work.
No credentials are stored in this file or anywhere else in this repo.
